data.content: Implementation review rejected on 2026-03-10: beat detail still renders/copies the raw beat id instead of the natural beat id required by the acceptance criteria (see src/components/beat-detail-lightbox.tsx:211-215 and :293-299), and the full sanity gate fails because bun run test still fails at src/lib/__tests__/knots-backend.test.ts:551 where dotted alias parent inference returns undefined instead of 8792.
